Verified from verifier.py logic (`if len(rows) >= 40:`) and task instructions.
Verified from task instructions ('~75% Go trials') and verifier.py which centers its acceptance range at 0.75.
verifier.py strictly enforces a Go trial ratio between 0.70 and 0.80. This is a ±0.05 tolerance around the 0.75 target, not ±0.1 (unless 0.1 meant total range).

privileged_info_summary: The task requires generating a PsychoPy experiment and a conditions CSV from scratch. The CSV must be saved to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/go_nogo_task/go_nogo_conditions.csv with at least 40 trials. The verifier checks that the ratio of Go trials is exactly between 0.70 and 0.80 (target 0.75 ± 0.05), which contradicts the stated metadata tolerance of 0.1 (if interpreted as a ± tolerance).
